summary: Iteration 16 - AgentConfig Integrations Tab Testing Complete. All backend tests (22/22) passed. All frontend features verified successfully. Both Google 'connected' and 'not connected' states display correctly. Integrations config saves and persists correctly through agent PUT API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 successfully verified Google Integration UI on AgentConfig page. Key test results: (1) AgentConfig page loads with all 6 tabs (Personality, Knowledge, Integrations, Channels, Escalation, Automations) - PASSED, (2) When Google NOT connected: Shows 'Connect your Google account' with 'Connect Google' button - PASSED, (3) When Google IS connected: Shows 'Google connected: testuser@gmail.com' status with Calendar/Sheets/Drive toggles - PASSED, (4) Google Calendar toggle shows 'Primary calendar' dropdown with refresh button - PASSED, (5) Google Sheets toggle shows spreadsheet dropdown + range input + 'Open spreadsheet' link - PASSED, (6) Google Drive toggle works - PASSED, (7) Custom API toggle shows URL and API Key inputs when enabled - PASSED, (8) Webhooks toggle shows URL input when enabled - PASSED, (9) Save button successfully saves integrations_config - PASSED, (10) PUT /api/agents/{agent_id} correctly saves integrations_config (google_calendar.enabled, calendar_id, google_sheets.enabled, spreadsheet_id, range) - PASSED, (11) GET /api/agents/{agent_id} correctly returns integrations_config, personality_config, channel_config - PASSED. NOTE: Google Calendar/Sheets list endpoints return 401 when not connected (expected) or 500 with mock tokens (expected since mock tokens can't authenticate with real Google API).

GET /api/google/calendar/list.returns: 401 when not connected, 500 with mock tokens
GET /api/google/calendar/list.notes: Expected - mock tokens cannot authenticate with real Google API

GET /api/google/sheets/list.returns: 401 when not connected, 500 with mock tokens
GET /api/google/sheets/list.notes: Expected - mock tokens cannot authenticate with real Google API

google_not_connected_state.shows: 'Connect your Google account' with 'Connect Google' button

google_connected_state.note: Tested when mock tokens were set
